# ==========================================
# CONTENT USAGE POLICY
# ==========================================
Usage:
- Content may be summarized and cited.
- Attribution is required with a link to the Preferred-URL.
- Do not misrepresent authorship.

# ==========================================
# TRAINING PERMISSIONS (OPTIONAL CONTROL)
# ==========================================
Training:
- Allowed for public AI systems with attribution.
- Do not use content for model training without credit.
